body: ## [2.7.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.7.2...v2.7.3) (2018-04-26) ### Bug Fixes * **index.es6:** avoid use of Object.assign for IE ([#2908](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2908)) ([228b02e](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/228b02e))
